summary: The audience analysis identifies four distinct segments for Dune: Awakening, each with unique motivations and overlapping interest with existing competitors. Sci-Fi Story Seekers are drawn by narrative-rich experiences, engaging with titles like Star Wars: The Old Republic. Sandbox Survival Enthusiasts seek creative, open-world gameplay similar to Conan Exiles and Rust. Competitive MMO Strategists thrive in multiplayer PvP environments, playing games like Black Desert Online. Lore-Driven Builders and Creators focus on crafting within a narrative universe, also engaging with Conan Exiles. These segments reflect varying player priorities, from narrative immersion to competitive strategy.

segments.description: Players passionate about deep, narrative-rich experiences set in expansive sci-fi universes. They are drawn by storytelling, world-building, and thematic immersion. Distinct from gameplay-focused or PvP-driven players.
Players who enjoy sandbox environments for creativity in survival strategies and exploration. They favor emergent gameplay and the ability to shape their environment over narrative-driven structures.
Players engaged by structured multiplayer experiences and competitive gameplay. They value strategic gameplay and social status, focusing on PvP and large-scale battles rather than narrative content.
Players interested in crafting and customization that reflect the game's lore. They focus on building mechanics within a narrative universe, distinct from those motivated by gameplay or PvP elements.
